name: True Enterprise Data Knowledge Through Integrated Data Marts
description: Aberdeen Group argues that the proliferation of standalone departmental data marts—while individually successful—creates enterprise fragmentation, contradictory business rules, and ROI erosion. The study presents an iterative 'integrated data marts' architecture: building subject-specific data marts that feed a common RDBMS-based enterprise warehouse, using high-level industry templates and synchronization methodologies to deliver both business-unit autonomy and enterprise data integrity.
